summary: Hand-merged isCobraUsageError() into root.go to satisfy the new generated root_test.go that v4.5.2 emits.
reason: regen-merge from pp v4.0.6 to v4.5.2 left root.go classified as TEMPLATED-BODY-DRIFT (we'd modified the JSON encoder block earlier). The fresh root_test.go file references isCobraUsageError(), so the test wouldn't compile without the function. Re-added the function and the call site that wraps Cobra/pflag pre-RunE errors in usageErr() so they exit with code 2.
validated_outcome: `go vet ./...` and `go test ./internal/cli/` pass; verify-skill PASS.
upstream_issue: cli-printing-press: regen-merge's BODY-DRIFT classification correctly avoids overwriting hand-edits, but should optionally emit a stub for required new functions to keep tests compiling.
